---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: "Natalia Varela"
---
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
# reading data file
lobster_traps <- read_csv("../data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")
```
# Question 1: convert missing values using mutate () and na_if()
```{r}
lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
  mutate(TRAPS = na_if(TRAPS, -99999))

#To check if the output changed
unique(lobster_traps$TRAPS)
```

# Question 2: filter ( ) practice
```{r}
lobster_traps_not_NAPL <- lobster_traps %>% 
  filter(SITE != "NAPL")
```

# Question 3: filter ( ) practice

```{r}
carp_reef_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
  filter(SITE == "CARP" &  TRAPS > 20)
```

# Question 4> filter ( ) practice

```{r}
max_comm_trap  <- max(lobster_traps$TRAPS, na.rm = FALSE)
max_comm_trap

comm_trap_float <- lobster_traps %>% 
  group_by(SITE,MONTH)
```
